title: Observation of Coherent Elastic Neutrino-Nucleus Scattering by COHERENT
abstract: The COHERENT collaboration measured coherent elastic neutrino-nucleus scattering (CEvNS) for the first time at the Spallation Neutron Source at Oak Ridge National Laboratory, using a CsI[Na] detector. Here we discuss the nature of the CEvNS process, physics motivations, and experimental considerations for measuring CEvNS. We describe the CsI[Na] measurement, along with status and future of COHERENT.
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures. For proceedings of the 19th International Workshop on Neutrinos from Accelerators-NUFACT2017
